name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗Fendi's latest small Simply model, exuding a high-end sense of relaxation. Soft calfskin material feels incredibly delicate. Zipper design gives you your own private space. The adjustable shoulder strap is amazing. Can be worn on the shoulder or carried by hand. A versatile bag that adapts to your needs. So cool!
349
Size 22x4.5x13cm
